retry_reason: mdiobus_free decrements the refcount unconditionally; once called the object may be freed. Retrying would cause a use-after-free or double-free.
contract_summary: This is a put-wrapper that releases the reference held on the MII bus (priv->mdio). It must be called only after the bus has been unregistered (mdiobus_unregister) and when no further access to the bus is needed. After this call, the caller must not use the priv->mdio pointer. The function is unconditional and does not need return value checking; it properly cleans up the bus lifecycle.

judge.reason: The sole purpose of ax88172a_remove_mdio is to unregister and free the MII bus, where mdiobus_free performs a put (refcount decrement) on the bus. Logging is trivial and does not detract from the refcount-release semantics.

The access path from parameter 1 (dev) via driver_priv, mdio, dev, kobj, kref, refcount matches the callee's path bus.dev.kobj.kref.refcount. The type chain is consistent with the struct definitions.
